title: Stock markets are wobbling, but £10bn cash bids at fat premiums can still happen
description: A Swedish firm’s pursuit of the product testing company Intertek suggests investors’ price expectations are yet to be shifted by the Iran war
content: It was a bad day for the FTSE 100 index on Tuesday – down 1.4% – but the puzzle in many quarters is why share prices haven’t fallen further since the start of the US-Israel war on Iran. The index is still up by a couple of percentage points since new... [3096 chars]

title: Oleshky the front-line city where Ukrainians are trapped
description: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.
content:
"The road is mined. So, we're stuck here," says Ludmilla, over the phone from the rooftop of a fire-damaged house in southern Ukraine. "People are trying their best to survive."
Her frontline home city of Oleshky has, according to multiple accounts, ... [6427 chars]

title: Campaigning sprint finish ahead of elections around Britain
description: A mesmerising mix of results are expected after candidates make their final pitches, our political editor writes.
content:
We stand on the cusp of the biggest set of elections since the general election two years ago.
Tomorrow morning, polling stations will be open in communities across Scotland and Wales, as voters choose who should run their devolved governments - and ... [4496 chars]

title: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
description: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
content:
Apple has agreed to pay some iPhone buyers a collective $250m (£184m) to end a lawsuit accusing the company of misleading people about new artificial intelligence (AI) features and capabilities.
In a settlement filed Tuesday in California federal cou... [1815 chars]

title: Catherine to return to overseas visits with trip to Italy
description: The Princess of Wales will go to Italy next week on her first official overseas engagement for more than three years.
content:
The Princess of Wales will travel to Italy next week on her first official overseas engagement for more than three years.
